question: How many users are there in total?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.users`

question: How many orders have status 'Complete'?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.orders` WHERE status = 'Complete'

question: How many distinct product categories are there?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT category) AS n FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.products`

question: What is the total revenue from completed orders?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS total FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` oi JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.orders` o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status = 'Complete'

question: How many products are in the catalog?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.products`

question: How many distinct countries are our users from?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT country) AS n FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.users`

question: What is the average retail price of our products?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(retail_price), 2) AS avg_price FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.products`

question: How many orders have been cancelled?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.orders` WHERE status = 'Cancelled'

question: How many orders are there per status?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS n FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.orders` GROUP BY status ORDER BY n DESC

question: What are the top 5 product categories by total revenue from completed orders?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT p.category, ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS revenue FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` oi JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.orders` o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.products` p ON oi.product_id = p.id WHERE o.status = 'Complete' GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 5

question: What is the average number of orders per user?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT ROUND(COUNT(*) / COUNT(DISTINCT user_id), 2) AS avg_orders_per_user FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.orders`

question: What are the top 10 countries by total revenue from completed orders?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT u.country, ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS revenue FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` oi JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.orders` o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.users` u ON o.user_id = u.id WHERE o.status = 'Complete' GROUP BY u.country ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 10

question: What are the top 10 products by units sold (only counting completed orders)?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT p.name, COUNT(*) AS units_sold FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` oi JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.orders` o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.products` p ON oi.product_id = p.id WHERE o.status = 'Complete' GROUP BY p.name ORDER BY units_sold DESC LIMIT 10

question: What is the average sale price per product category?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT p.category, ROUND(AVG(oi.sale_price), 2) AS avg_price FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` oi JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.products` p ON oi.product_id = p.id GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY avg_price DESC

question: Top 5 brands by total revenue from completed orders
ground_truth_sql: SELECT p.brand, ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS revenue FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` oi JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.orders` o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.products` p ON oi.product_id = p.id WHERE o.status = 'Complete' AND p.brand IS NOT NULL GROUP BY p.brand ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 5

question: What is the gender distribution of our users?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT gender, COUNT(*) AS n FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.users` GROUP BY gender ORDER BY n DESC

question: Average user age by country, including only countries with at least 100 users
ground_truth_sql: SELECT country, ROUND(AVG(age), 1) AS avg_age, COUNT(*) AS users FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.users` GROUP BY country HAVING COUNT(*) >= 100 ORDER BY avg_age DESC

question: How many distinct customers placed an order in 2023?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS n FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.orders` WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM created_at) = 2023

question: What are the top 5 traffic sources by user count?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT traffic_source, COUNT(*) AS n FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.users` GROUP BY traffic_source ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 5

question: How many products does each department have?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT department, COUNT(*) AS n FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.products` GROUP BY department ORDER BY n DESC

question: For each country, what is the top selling product (by name) ranked by total revenue from completed orders?
ground_truth_sql: WITH r AS (SELECT u.country, p.name AS product_name, SUM(oi.sale_price) AS rev FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` oi JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.orders` o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.users` u ON o.user_id = u.id JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.products` p ON oi.product_id = p.id WHERE o.status = 'Complete' GROUP BY u.country, p.name), ranked AS (SELECT country, product_name, rev, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY country ORDER BY rev DESC) AS rn FROM r) SELECT country, product_name, ROUND(rev, 2) AS revenue FROM ranked WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY country

question: What are the top 3 products (by name) in each category, ranked by total revenue from completed orders?
ground_truth_sql: WITH r AS (SELECT p.category, p.name AS product_name, SUM(oi.sale_price) AS rev FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` oi JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.orders` o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.products` p ON oi.product_id = p.id WHERE o.status = 'Complete' GROUP BY p.category, p.name), ranked AS (SELECT category, product_name, rev, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY category ORDER BY rev DESC) AS rn FROM r) SELECT category, product_name, ROUND(rev, 2) AS revenue FROM ranked WHERE rn <= 3 ORDER BY category, rn

question: For each month of 2024, show the total revenue from completed orders and the percentage growth versus the previous month
ground_truth_sql: WITH monthly AS (SELECT DATE_TRUNC(DATE(o.created_at), MONTH) AS month, SUM(oi.sale_price) AS rev FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` oi JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.orders` o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status = 'Complete' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.created_at) = 2024 GROUP BY month) SELECT month, ROUND(rev, 2) AS revenue, ROUND((rev - LAG(rev) OVER (ORDER BY month)) / LAG(rev) OVER (ORDER BY month) * 100, 2) AS mom_growth_pct FROM monthly ORDER BY month

question: How many users have ordered before but have NOT placed an order in the last 90 days (churned users)?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS churned_users FROM (SELECT user_id FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.orders` GROUP BY user_id HAVING MAX(created_at) < TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 90 DAY)) sub

question: Show total revenue from completed orders for each year from 2022 to 2024
ground_truth_sql: SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.created_at) AS year, ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS revenue FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` oi JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.orders` o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status = 'Complete' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.created_at) BETWEEN 2022 AND 2024 GROUP BY year ORDER BY year

question: Of the users whose first order was in January 2024, how many of them placed at least one order in each subsequent month of 2024?
ground_truth_sql: WITH first_order AS (SELECT user_id, MIN(DATE_TRUNC(DATE(created_at), MONTH)) AS cohort FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.orders` GROUP BY user_id), jan_cohort AS (SELECT user_id FROM first_order WHERE cohort = DATE '2024-01-01') SELECT DATE_TRUNC(DATE(o.created_at), MONTH) AS month, COUNT(DISTINCT o.user_id) AS active_users FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.orders` o JOIN jan_cohort j ON o.user_id = j.user_id WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.created_at) = 2024 GROUP BY month ORDER BY month

question: Across all users who placed at least 2 orders, what is the overall average number of days between their consecutive orders? Return a single number.
ground_truth_sql: WITH user_stats AS (SELECT user_id, MIN(created_at) AS first_o, MAX(created_at) AS last_o, COUNT(*) AS n FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.orders` GROUP BY user_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2) SELECT ROUND(AVG(TIMESTAMP_DIFF(last_o, first_o, DAY) / (n - 1)), 1) AS avg_days_between_orders FROM user_stats

question: How many new users signed up in each month of 2024?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC(DATE(created_at), MONTH) AS month, COUNT(*) AS new_users FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.users` WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM created_at) = 2024 GROUP BY month ORDER BY month

question: Group users into 4 age buckets ('under_25' for age<25, '25_to_39' for ages 25-39, '40_to_59' for ages 40-59, '60_plus' for age>=60). Which bucket generates the most revenue from completed orders?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN u.age < 25 THEN 'under_25' WHEN u.age < 40 THEN '25_to_39' WHEN u.age < 60 THEN '40_to_59' ELSE '60_plus' END AS age_group, ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS revenue FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` oi JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.orders` o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.users` u ON o.user_id = u.id WHERE o.status = 'Complete' GROUP BY age_group ORDER BY revenue DESC

question: For each of the most recent 90 calendar days, compute the daily revenue from completed orders, and the 7-day rolling average of that daily revenue (current day plus 6 prior days)
ground_truth_sql: WITH daily AS (SELECT DATE(o.created_at) AS d, SUM(oi.sale_price) AS rev FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` oi JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.orders` o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status = 'Complete' AND DATE(o.created_at) >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY) GROUP BY d) SELECT d AS day, ROUND(rev, 2) AS daily_revenue, ROUND(AVG(rev) OVER (ORDER BY d ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW), 2) AS rolling_7d_avg FROM daily ORDER BY d
